name: superworkflows
description: Robotics AI Coding Loop Engineering with a discoverable safe router, explicit persistent runs, adversarial review, evidence integrity, safety gates, and controlled learning.

interface.shortDescription: Safe robotics AI Coding Loop Engineering
interface.longDescription: Superworkflows combines a discoverable session-only router with explicit persistent robotics engineering runs through repository exploration, planning, isolated implementation, adversarial review, remediation, evidence capture, integration, validation, release gating, and approval-controlled learning. Its protocol forbids implicit persistent state, Run resume, CodeGraph mutation, and external or robot authority; hard isolation remains with the Codex sandbox, approvals, and system permissions.
defaultPrompt: Describe a complex robotics task for safe session-only workflow routing.
$run — explicitly start a persistent robotics loop.
